use_cases: User authentication screens with animated form field reveals
Social login options display with icon integration
Onboarding flows with staggered text animations
Interactive login forms with circular progress indicators
ai_summary: An animated login form component featuring staggered text animations, social authentication icons (GitHub, Shopify, Twitch, YouTube), circular progress indicators, and dark mode support. Uses Framer Motion for smooth entrance animations with configurable delay timing. Ideal for SaaS and e-commerce authentication screens requiring engaging micro-interactions.
